overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves from an open waterfront promenade past palm trees, crosses an intersection, and enters a covered underpass with heavy traffic and hanging advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade beside yellow industrial building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront sidewalk next to a large yellow building wall

entered.detail: large industrial yellow concrete wall with panel lines
tall skyscraper with illuminated 03 signage near the top
dark water canal running parallel to the walkway
dominant tall building with multiple illuminated windows and 03 sign

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a concrete waterfront promenade at night, with a massive yellow industrial wall on the left and a dark canal on the right. The iconic 03 skyscraper dominates the skyline ahead, lit with neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront overlook with view across canal

events.description: player turns left to look across the canal at distant buildings 06 and 07
player turns back to face forward along the path

agents.ego_description: stopping to pan left and observe the canal view, moon, and distant numbered buildings

entered.detail: full moon visible in the night sky above the buildings
cable structures spanning across the canal area

segments.scene_description: The player pauses to look left across the dark canal, revealing buildings labeled 06 and 07 against the night sky with a visible moon. After a moment, the view returns to the forward path.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined city street with neon billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing palm trees and other pedestrians in a bustling neon-lit area

notable_agents.action: person in bright clothing walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the walkway
cluster of illuminated digital advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the waterfront, the path is now lined with palm trees on the left and bright neon billboards on the right. The 03 skyscraper remains visible ahead as the player passes other pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with crosswalk and overpass entrance

events.description: player crosses the street at the yellow striped crosswalk while futuristic cars pass by
approaching the entrance to the covered underpass beneath the overpass

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and approaching the underpass entrance while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
wide road intersection with multiple lanes and traffic
dark entrance to the covered roadway beneath the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The player crosses a busy intersection with yellow crosswalk stripes, navigating through moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic. The scene opens into a wide plaza area as the player approaches the dark entrance to a covered underpass beneath an elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass with hanging advertisements and heavy traffic

events.description: entering the covered underpass with overhead roadway and suspended lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered roadway under the overpass alongside moving traffic and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving alongside the sidewalk in the underpass

entered.detail: vertical hanging banners with El Guapo branding suspended from the ceiling
concrete underside of the elevated highway with structural beams and lights
multi-lane road running through the covered tunnel structure

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dark, enclosed underpass beneath an elevated highway, where the sky is completely obscured by concrete. El Guapo banners hang from the ceiling above a busy roadway with futuristic cars passing by, while pedestrians walk along the narrow sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open, neon-lit waterfront promenade into the claustrophobic depths of a concrete urban underpass. It begins along a concrete walkway flanked by a massive yellow industrial wall and a dark canal, with the camera briefly panning left to reveal distant buildings and a moonlit sky before returning to the path toward the towering 03 skyscraper. As the movement continues, the environment shifts to a palm-lined stretch filled with bright billboards and passing pedestrians. The scene then opens into a wide plaza as the camera navigates a busy intersection with yellow crosswalks, moving through a flow of vehicles and people. Finally, the open night sky vanishes as the camera enters a dark, enclosed underpass beneath an elevated highway, where El Guapo banners hang over a congested roadway of futuristic cars.
